claim_bullets.bullet_text: Functions are applied to arguments, producing a value (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.31-31).
The syntax for applying a function is fn_expr (args) (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.31-31).
Parentheses are used both for grouping operations and for applying functions (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.31-31).

source_record_text: Summary of the applying functions chapter from JavaScript Allongé.
